subcodes.first_line: O ye who stand firm in the Covenant! Your letter dated 11 April 1919, together with two treatises, was received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان نامه که بتاریخ ۱۱ آپریل ۱۹۱۹ مرقوم نموده بودید با دو رساله
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @review of publications, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @elections, @unity; oneness of humanity
